2604.06098.title: JUÁ - A Benchmark for Information Retrieval in Brazilian Legal Text Collections
2604.06098.paper_summary: Legal information retrieval in Portuguese remains difficult to evaluate systematically because available datasets differ widely in document type, query style, and relevance definition. We present \textsc{JUÁ}, a public benchmark for Brazilian legal retrieval designed to support more reproducible and comparable evaluation across heterogeneous legal collections. More broadly, \textsc{JUÁ} is intended not only as a benchmark, but as a continuous evaluation infrastructure for Brazilian legal IR, combining shared protocols, common ranking metrics, fixed splits when applicable, and a public leaderboard. The benchmark covers jurisprudence retrieval as well as broader legislative, regulatory, and question-driven legal search. We evaluate lexical, dense, and BM25-based reranking pipelines, including a domain-adapted Qwen embedding model fine-tuned on \textsc{JUÁ}-aligned supervision. Results show that the benchmark is sufficiently heterogeneous to distinguish retrieval paradigms and reveal substantial cross-dataset trade-offs. Domain adaptation yields its clearest gains on the supervision-aligned \textsc{JUÁ-Juris} subset, while BM25 remains highly competitive on other collections, especially in settings with strong lexical and institutional phrasing cues. Overall, \textsc{JUÁ} provides a practical evaluation framework for studying legal retrieval across multiple Brazilian legal domains under a common benchmark design.
2604.06098.paper_summary_zh: 法律信息檢索在葡萄牙語中仍然難以系統性評估，因為可用的數據集在文檔類型、查詢風格和相關性定義上差異很大。<lb/>我們提出了 \textsc{JUÁ}，這是一個針對巴西法律檢索的公共基準，旨在支持在異質法律集合中進行更可重複和可比較的評估。<lb/>更廣泛地說，\textsc{JUÁ} 不僅作為基準，還作為巴西法律信息檢索的持續評估基礎設施，結合了共享協議、共同排名指標、在適用時的固定劃分和公共排行榜。<lb/>該基準涵蓋了法學檢索以及更廣泛的立法、監管和問題驅動的法律搜索。<lb/>我們評估了基於詞彙、密集和 BM25 的重新排名管道，包括在 \textsc{JUÁ} 對齊監督下微調的領域適應 Qwen 嵌入模型。<lb/>結果顯示，該基準足夠異質，以區分檢索範式並揭示實質性的跨數據集權衡。<lb/>領域適應在與監督對齊的 \textsc{JUÁ-Juris} 子集上獲得了最明顯的增益，而 BM25 在其他集合中仍然具有高度競爭力，特別是在具有強烈詞彙和機構措辭提示的環境中。<lb/>總體而言，\textsc{JUÁ} 提供了一個實用的評估框架，用於在共同基準設計下研究多個巴西法律領域的法律檢索。
2604.06098.author: Jayr Pereira et.al.
2604.06098.authors: Jayr Pereira, Leandro Fernandes, Erick de Brito, Roberto Lotufo, Luiz Bonifacio
